summary: Comprehensive testing of G/L Account Mapping Refactor feature. All 44 backend tests passed (16 unit + 15 API + 13 new G/L Account feature tests). Verified all 20 freight mapping rules now have target_type='gl_account' and target_no='60500'. Frontend correctly displays Account/Item/Comment badges with correct styling.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings about <tr> and <span> elements in table - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings - returns 20 mappings with target_type='gl_account', target_no='60500'
POST /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings - creates G/L Account mapping with target_type='gl_account'
POST /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings - creates Item mapping with target_type='item'
PUT /api/gpi-integration/item-mappings/{id} - updates target_type from item to gl_account
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns lineType='Account' for gl_account mappings
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns lineType='Item' for item mappings
POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns lineType='Comment' for unmapped lines
Frontend: CreateBCSalesOrderPanel shows 'Account' badge (blue) for G/L Account lines
Frontend: CreateBCSalesOrderPanel shows 'Item' badge (green) for Item lines
Frontend: CreateBCSalesOrderPanel shows 'Comment' badge for unmapped lines
Frontend: Shows target_no '60500' with confidence percentage and 'Shipping / Delivery' description
seed_data_creation: Test document 44b2e236-c1ab-4e0e-9c23-23f542d68a71 has Widget A/Widget B lines. 20 freight mapping rules all point to GL account 60500. BC catalog: 1000 items, 169 GL accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: G/L Account mapping refactor is complete and working. All 20 freight/service mapping rules have target_type='gl_account' and target_no='60500' (Shipping / Delivery). The system correctly distinguishes between Item (target_type='item', lineType='Item'), G/L Account (target_type='gl_account', lineType='Account'), and Comment (unmapped) line types. Frontend badges: Account=blue, Item=green, Comment=default. Test with document 44b2e236-c1ab-4e0e-9c23-23f542d68a71.
